title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises!
